response: Define the study objectives to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Identify the target population to gather data accurately and manage data effectively. Collect data through interviews and observations to ensure data quality and relevance. Store data securely to protect data integrity and allow data retrieval. Analyze data using statistical tools to interpret data patterns and relationships. Validate data through cross-checking to confirm data accuracy and consistency. Interpret data findings to draw conclusions and support data-based decisions. Share data results with stakeholders to inform data-driven policies and future research.
